nodes.name: cpu-profiling.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide for CPU profiling RisingWave using flamegraphs, covering profiling on the host via perf/cargo-flamegraph, profiling remote compute nodes via curl, and profiling on macOS.

nodes.name: memory-profiling.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive heap profiling guide (228 lines) covering jemalloc-based memory collection, manual profiling, cloud dashboard profiling, jeprof analysis, and flame graph visualization for diagnosing RisingWave memory usage.

nodes.name: microbenchmarks.md
nodes.summary: Guide for running Rust micro-benchmarks (Criterion/Iai) in RisingWave and generating flamegraphs for micro-benchmark results.
